features: COMPACT DESIGN: Digital scales weigh up to 100lb/50kg to make you a smart traveller. The scale will end up paying for itself by reducing extortionate excess baggage fees. Having this portable scale on hand saves time and eliminates the hassle of opening bags and repacking.

STURDY AND DURABLE: This digital scale fits easily into your hand because of its sleek and ergonomic design. This luggage scale is manufactured by using high-quality ABS plastic material which makes it durable and reliable. The robust strap and fastener can stretch around pretty much any luggage handle. This scale specifically weighs suitcases, bags, and backpacks.

EASY TO USE: This portable travel scale is easy to use, lightweight, and cost-effective. Simply turn it on, loop the strap around your bag handle, lift the bag, and read the weight. It's compact, making it easy to carry in your suitcase and helps you avoid extra baggage fees. A must-have for stress-free travel.
CLEAR AND SIMPLE: The LCD backlit digital display on our luggage scales is clear and easy to read, allowing you to measure your luggage weight quickly and accurately.
